name: External Scripts Loader
description: Automatically loads external JavaScript files from a designated scripts directory
features: Error handling for failed script loads

name: Configurable Menu Keybind
description: Customizable keybind to toggle the menu with visual reminder in lobby
features: Dynamic keybind reminder updates when settings change
Shows current menu keybind at bottom of lobby

name: News System
description: Displays customizable news cards with categories and rich media
features: Fetches news data from remote repository

name: Discord Integration
description: Replaces social button with a branded Discord invite button
features: Shows Discord linked and booster badges

name: Crosshair Settings
description: Persistent crosshair options for better aiming
features: Option to keep crosshair always visible

name: Chat & Interface Hiding
description: Options to hide various UI elements for cleaner gameplay

name: Loading Screen Skip
description: Skip loading screens for faster gameplay

name: Custom Hitmarkers
description: Replace default hitmarker with custom image

name: Custom Kill Icons
description: Replace kill icons with custom images

name: Rave Mode
description: Animated hue rotation effect for vibrant visuals

name: Gradient Names
description: Gradient-colored usernames with rotation angles and color stops

name: UI Animation Toggle
description: Disable all UI transitions and animations

name: Profile Badges
description: Displays player customizations on profile pages

name: Custom Map Backgrounds
description: Replaces server list backgrounds with custom map images
features: Fetches map images from remote repository

name: Profile Navigation
description: Shift-click usernames to navigate to profiles

name: Friend Manager
description: Search and filter friends by username or ID
features: Shift-click friend status to copy game link to clipboard

name: External CSS Support
description: Load custom CSS from URLs for advanced styling
features: Dynamic theme updates without page reload

name: Custom Notifications
description: Custom styled notifications for client events
features: Real-time UI updates based on setting changes
